changes: Fixed theme color flash on startup: the selected theme (dark/light/system) is now applied synchronously before the first render, so the page no longer briefly flashes the wrong colors when opening the popup, manager, or donate page
Added 'Stay unlocked between sessions' checkbox directly on the login screen — no need to go into settings to enable it
Added 'Always open bookmarks in incognito' option in Settings under Privacy — when enabled, all bookmarks open in a private window automatically
Performance: favicon loading is now queued (max 4 concurrent requests) — opening large folders no longer causes the popup to freeze
Performance: encrypted data is now stored as Base64 instead of number arrays — saves ~62% storage space and speeds up every save operation by ~2.5×
Performance: folder sidebar now uses a single delegated event listener instead of attaching one per folder — fixes memory leak in long sessions
Performance: switching between folders no longer scans all sidebar items to remove the active highlight
Performance: Shift-click multi-selection no longer queries the DOM on every iteration
Performance: drag-and-drop in the popup skips already-initialized items on refresh
Fixed batch deletion of selected bookmarks in the bookmark manager

Added "Stay unlocked between sessions" option in settings — when enabled, the encryption key is stored in browser session storage and survives popup close without requiring re-entry of the master password
Popup now blocks interaction and shows a "Switch to Manager" screen when the bookmark manager tab is already open
Hotkeys moved to a dedicated section in settings
Added global hotkey Alt+L (Cmd+Shift+L on Mac) to lock both the popup and the manager
Fix quick-actions panel remaining visible after auto-lock
Quick actions panel now displays each action as an icon with a text label instead of icon-only buttons
Added QR code button to the quick actions panel
Minor UI display fixes
Quick actions panel now opens on button click instead of mouse hover — both in the manager and popup
Added a persistent three-dot (⋮) button on each bookmark and folder item to toggle the quick actions panel
Added welcome page — opens automatically after installation
Updated donation page
Added keyboard shortcut support for macOS — Quick Close Tab now uses Command+Shift+A on Mac (Alt+A on  Windows/Linux)
Keyboard shortcut in the Quick Close Tab label now reflects the actual assigned shortcut dynamically
Minor UI display fixes
Added Quick Close Tab feature — press Alt+A to instantly close the current tab and delete all browsing history for its domain
Quick Close Tab is disabled by default and can be enabled in Settings under Privacy
Minor UI display fixes
Minor UI display fixes
Added HTML bookmarks export — export bookmarks to Netscape HTML format (compatible with Chrome, Firefox, Edge, etc.)
Minor UI display fixes
Minor UI display fixes
Added "Changelog" button in settings — view the update history right inside the extension
Extension version is now shown in the popup header
Added "Feedback Survey" button in settings
Renamed button: "Export" → "Create Backup"
Simplified lock screen titles and labels
Folder picker when adding or editing a bookmark is now a visual tree instead of a plain dropdown list
Redesigned interface: lighter and faster styles across the popup, login, and settings screens
Added protection against browser auto-translate (Google Translate no longer breaks the UI)
Drag & drop now shows a nice ghost element with an icon and name while dragging
Fixed a bug with folders in the bookmark manager
The sidebar in the bookmark manager is now resizable — drag the divider to adjust its width
All notification and error messages are now fully translated into all supported languages
Redesigned lock screen and page structure
Minor style fixes on the setup screen
Improved appearance of the initial setup screen
Fixed the "Unlock" button not responding to clicks
New first-run setup screen with two tabs: "Create New" and "Restore Backup"
Password strength indicator added when creating a new vault
Backup restore is now available directly on the setup screen — drag a file or click to select
Master password change is now safer: data is saved with a backup point in case of an error
Site favicons now load from a more reliable source
Minor UI display fixes
Fixed minor animation and initialization issues
Visual polish: updated styles across popup, manager, and donation screens
Minor popup style improvements
Drag & drop in the bookmark manager now supports reordering items within the grid, not just moving into folders
Items can now be dropped directly onto folders in the bookmark manager sidebar
Folders now have stable IDs — open/collapsed state is preserved correctly after saving or reloading
The popup remembers which folders were open between sessions
Added breadcrumb navigation in the bookmark manager — shows your current folder path with clickable segments
The bookmark manager now remembers which folders were expanded when refreshing the folder tree
Clicking a bookmark now automatically expands and highlights its parent folder in the sidebar
Fixed sidebar display after unlocking the bookmark manager
Drag & drop added to the bookmark manager — move bookmarks and folders by dragging them
Search in the bookmark manager now works across all folders, not just the current one
Improved bookmark count display in the sidebar
Removed emoji from interface labels for a cleaner look
Fixed Chinese (Simplified) translation
Fixed bookmark and folder count display in the bookmark manager sidebar
Minor donation reminder fixes
Added donation reminder — a non-intrusive prompt shown occasionally to support the project, with options to remind later or dismiss permanently
Fixed duplicate text in localization files
